top_signals.title: Fed’s Jefferson Warns of Inflation Risks From Energy Price Surge - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Fed’s Jefferson Warns of Inflation Risks From Energy Price Surge  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on Github
top_signals.summary: Until this past weekend, a contractor for the Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) maintained a public GitHub repository that exposed credentials to several highly privileged AWS GovCloud accounts and a large number of internal CISA systems. Security experts said the public archive included files detailing how CISA builds, tests and deploys software internally, and that it represents one of the most egregious government data leaks in recent history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: World Cup can save British pubs from government uncertainty this summer
top_signals.summary: When England kick off their World Cup campaign against Croatia next month, many will be watching from the comfort of pubs nationwide. top_signals.title: Milburn review: Youth unemployment crisis costs £125bn a year due to ‘broken system’
top_signals.summary: The crisis of nearly a million young people who are out of education, employment or training – known as ‘Neets’ – costs the UK economy up to £125bn a year, the Alan Milburn review has found, as both the government and the private sector were blamed for failing to address youth unemployment. An extensive report [...]

top_signals.title: Commission fines Temu €200 million for breaching the Digital Services Act
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 28 May 2026 Today, the European Commission issued a fine of €200 million to Temu under the Digital Services Act (DSA).

top_signals.title: Rudd orders Cyber Command reviews as Pentagon presses reform agenda
top_signals.summary: Army Gen. Joshua Rudd, who took the twin-leadership reins of Cyber Command and the NSA in March, recently tapped MITRE to conduct a potentially wide-ranging review into the organization, according to three people familiar with the matter.
